colors.palette_notes: Blue (Slate-900/800) is the base for trust. Coral (#F05D5E) is the vibrant action color. Do not use Coral for backgrounds, only for CTAs and highlights.

layout_strategies.card_style: bg-card border border-border/50 hover:border-secondary/50 transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 group

buttons.primary: bg-secondary text-white hover:bg-secondary/90 rounded-full px-8 py-6 font-bold text-lg shadow-lg shadow-secondary/20 transition-transform active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-full px-6 py-4 font-semibold

inputs.default: h-12 rounded-lg border-slate-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-secondary/20 focus:border-secondary bg-white/50 backdrop-blur-sm

cards.service_card: flex flex-col h-full rounded-2xl overflow-hidden border border-border bg-card hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300

instructions_to_main_agent.general: You are building 'Bookvia'. Focus on trust and ease of use. Use the provided Blue/Coral palette strictly. Implement 'Manrope' for all headings and 'Inter' for body text. Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
instructions_to_main_agent.homepage: Build a hero section with a search bar (Service, City, Date) floating over the hero image or in a high-contrast block. Use a 'Bento Grid' for the 'Browse Categories' section.
instructions_to_main_agent.search_page: Implement a split layout: Filters on the left (sticky), Results in the center/right. Use wide cards for results showing Rating, Image, and 'Book Now' button in Coral.
instructions_to_main_agent.booking_flow: Multi-step modal or dedicated page. Step 1: Date/Time (Calendar). Step 2: Select Staff (Avatar grid). Step 3: Payment.
instructions_to_main_agent.dashboard: Use a sidebar layout. Dashboard must be dense but legible. Use 'Inter' for tables. Color code status: Green (Confirmed), Orange (Pending), Red (Cancelled).

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Do not use generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
Never use pure black (#000000). Use Slate-900 or Slate-950.
Always add hover states: hover:text-secondary or hover:-translate-y-1.
All interactive elements must have data-testid.
